MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.T. & S.A., AS SPECIAL ADMINISTRATOR OF THE ESTATE OF MARIE MCMURRAY,    DECEASED SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR DEC-30-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 206 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON JAN-04-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
JURY TRIAL CONTINUED TO JAN-04-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 PER DEPARTMENT AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ENTRIKEN, LAWRENCE A. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 610 COLE ST, #103, SF, CA $1,875.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,875.00, LEASE FORFEITED

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.T. & S.A., AS SPECIAL ADMINISTRATOR OF THE ESTATE OF MARIE MCMURRAY,    DECEASED AS TO DEFENDANT ENTRIKEN, LAWRENCE A. DOES 1 TO 50, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED

10:00 AM. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. PLTF COUNSEL, DAVE NEIMER APPEARING FOR PLTF. DEFT PRESENT IN PRO PER. PLTF COUNSEL READ PROPOSED DISPOSITION FOR ENTRY OF STIPULATED JUDGMENT INTO THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT FOR PLTF FOR REST & POSS OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 610 COLE ST. STAYED UNDER THE FOLLOWING CONDITIONS. DEFT TO PAY $1050.00 TO PLTF BY 1-5-94, 5PM. DEFT TO PAY $250.00 (ONE HALF OF JANUARY RENT) ON OR BEFORE 1-15-94. DEFT TO PAY BALANCE OF $875.00 (INCLUDES ATTY FEES) AT RATE OF $100.00 PER MONTH, STARTING 2-1-94 THROUGH 8-1-94. DEFT TO ALSO PAY $175.00 BY 8-15-94. UPON FINAL PAYMENT, PLTF AGREES TO DISMISS THIS ACTION.
